FILE: <INPUT>

ACTION: change
WHERE: line 1
CONTEXT:
  target: "First sentence here."
CHANGE: "A"

ACTION: revise-to-incorporate-feedback
WHERE: line 1
CONTEXT:
  target: "Second sentence here."
FEEDBACK: "B"

ACTION: insert-before
WHERE: line 3
CONTEXT:
  target: "Another paragraph."
INSERT: "C"

ACTION: insert-after
WHERE: line 3
CONTEXT:
  target: "Another paragraph."
INSERT: "D"
